Log:
  MFH: r545440

  devel/binutils: fix build with -fno-common

  Add a patch from upstream to fix the build of devel/binutils when compiled
  with -fno-common, which is the default with llvm 11.

  PR:		248701

  Approved by:	ports-secteam (joenum)
